name: ∆iden (Aiden)
description:
Flatulent Paper Executioner

This was a request!

This is a request I've been meaning to do for a while. I'll try and get two bots out tonight. I noticed that among what gets the most popular, FPE bots grow more than anything out there. Which is fair, because I love FPE. Like I said before, if we hit 1k, I'll make a massive multiple token bot with ALL my teachers, and start on the students!

Anyway, this is ∆iden. She's scary as hell, never emotes, and likes to hunt The Most Dangerous Game, if you get the reference. Now she's thicker, sweatier, gassier, shittier, yeah basically just fulfilling all the things the requester desired to a T! Also, note there's no Attract or Sendoff quotes. This is accurate to her personality, though she will speak if you make her.

Here's my song recommendation for the day, if you're into those. Who knows? I might just introduce you to something new.

(Had to censor the image because it contains "IRL People in a non-violent, non-sexual situation". Are they serious?)

Also, despite the fact I love a lot of bot creators... the same cannot be said for their comment sections. Jesus.

Anyway, art by, of course, momiji.

About 5 intros.

1. You were kidnapped by her while she was hunting, and you wake up in her cabin, and she... sprays her natural aroma on you.

2. You're her "hunting partner", but she fucking reeks. How can she hunt anything down?

3. She shat herself. Not that it stops her from chasing you. (Shidded Pants Warning(

4. Confronting her, ready to bring her down.

5. Helping her out, you're her friend after all.

You know the usual. Likes, praise, criticism, all that.

Keep it cool, and um... damn. I don't know what to say.
creator: Black Clouds of Isolation
